  • Earthbound Mobile
  • Earthbound Shared

Github

1.23.0 (2026-05-01)

Features

  • more endpoints added to api (#104) (ac82b0f)

1.22.0 (2026-05-01)

Bug Fixes

  • add env variables (f3e1182)
  • api migrated (eb88488)
  • bug fixes (6b04e43)
  • bug fixes (e1f3bdc)
  • code cleanup (1ae5108)
  • earthbound auth (77ac99f)
  • earthbound auth (de7a6e5)
  • env variables (3abae1e)
  • error catching (b338015)
  • fix (489a068)
  • function auth (205a4a6)
  • functions (4773b94)
  • haptic feedback (94e40c0)
  • image upload bug (2e1172b)
  • ios notif (6869281)
  • media content (390eb86)
  • mobile cleanup (572fb03)
  • mobile modals (62b7bfc)
  • notif service (d065fa0)
  • pls work (9aa7135)

Features

  • activity tracking (bb46540)
  • common dialog (3e3f2dc)
  • curated bento (764ceb5)
  • email signup (07bdb14)
  • empty states added (3831584)
  • goal notifs added (aedfe8e)
  • heic photo uploads (807a814)
  • mobile support added (6695223)
  • notification enhancement (4c66752)
  • notifications (902cf18)
  • Parks map added (#95) (01150f7)
  • photos (c279986)
  • redesign (#97) (45e0390)
  • search modal enhancements (74b7b38)
  • testing api server (dd9852d)
  • themes updated (93e08e3)
  • User requests added (#98) (4f80698)
  • workout generation (1578860)
  • workout rework (beb50dc)

Features

  • habits: add infinite habits and completion history heatmap (#82) (1f3e237)
  • media: add album media type with year timeline widget (#83) (8f152bf)

1.12.0 (2025-12-17)

Features

  • meals: add comprehensive meal planning and grocery system (#80) (2472fc9)
  • meals: add comprehensive meal planning and grocery system (#81) (e3b2bc9)

1.11.0 (2025-12-16)

Features

  • calendar: add event and task categories with year review insights (#79) (f6e62ef)

1.10.0 (2025-12-16)

Features

  • relationship: add comprehensive relationship tracking system (#77) (93218e2)

1.9.0 (2025-12-15)

Bug Fixes

  • bugs squashed (#72) (f9c6381)

Features

  • language integration added (#75) (c87d86e)

1.8.0 (2025-12-14)

Features

  • offline sycing added (#67) (522c92c)
  • pwa added for offline support (#66) (c292dc2)

1.7.0 (2025-12-12)

Bug Fixes

  • ui: add navigation and delete functionality (#52) (4a2b070)

Features

  • habits mobile view added (#64) (8e2ce8a)
  • media: add genre autocomplete and optimize page performance (#59) (25dfad6)
  • tasks have been updated to be mobile friendly (#63) (7d466b5)

1.6.0 (2025-12-09)

Features

  • dashboard: add loading states and optimize data fetching (#51) (66d2240)

1.5.0 (2025-12-09)

Features

  • homepage: add scratch pad widget (#44) (8e37859)

1.4.6 (2025-12-06)

Bug Fixes

  • release notes fix v2 (221c152)

1.4.5 (2025-12-06)

Bug Fixes

  • release notes fix (fa127d0)

1.4.4 (2025-12-06)

Bug Fixes

  • testing releases (b9d921e)

1.4.3 (2025-12-04)

Bug Fixes

  • auth: handle missing allowed_users table gracefully (#22) (0d932ea)

1.4.2 (2025-12-04)

Bug Fixes

  • build: improve Firebase App Hosting secret fetching (#15) (f2f0f35)

1.4.1 (2025-12-03)

Bug Fixes

  • dashboard: add goals section and improve loading states (#11) (54711b8)
  • db: add missing await keywords in async functions (#12) (520b90a)

1.4.0 (2025-12-03)

Features

  • media: add pagination for completed media with infinite scroll (#10) (6c77239)

1.3.1 (2025-12-02)

Bug Fixes

  • media: resolve parameter order and display issues (#8) (5c008ad)
  • resolve async/await and parameter issues (#9) (d499fb4)

1.3.0 (2025-12-02)

Features

  • tasks: add user templates and analytics tabs (d2b89f7)

1.2.1 (2025-12-02)

Bug Fixes

  • Resolve firebase quota error and search async bugs (110987d)

1.2.0 (2025-12-02)

Features

  • Homepage now pulls weather data (ad7580e)

1.1.0 (2025-12-02)

Features

  • Migrated DB out of local storage to a dedicated server (4eaf0ea)

1.0.0 (2025-11-30)

Bug Fixes

  • auth: merge callbacks to preserve user id in session (57f10b1)
  • mini cal indicator updated (31d08b8)
  • Resolve server/client component boundaries (afc3655)
  • security: add user-scoped data isolation for media and parks (bc2c488)

Features

  • achievements: add gamification achievements system (82ba1ae)
  • achievements: expand achievement system with new milestones (2b04ba0)
  • Add Strava exercise tracking integration (Phase 4) (a857259)
  • added the ability to customize calendar colors (4ec8565)
  • admin: add role-based access control system (98dcb95)
  • auth: add user allowlist and strava token refresh (d7131af)
  • calendar: add goals and milestones integration (4019370)
  • dashboard: add action banner for mood and habit reminders (4d4b5ae)
  • flags: add firebase remote config for feature flags (726e06c)
  • goals: add comprehensive goals tracking feature (94eaa9a)
  • habits: add habit completion and enhanced streak tracking (5886234)
  • habits: add habit tracking system (051eb64)
  • habits: filter habits by creation date on daily pages (a399059)
  • Implement layout, navigation, and theme system (447e5e6)
  • Implement media library and quick links (Phase 2) (8f52265)
  • lint: enforce cursor-pointer on all buttons (ea90553)
  • media: add filtering, sorting and tag management (57310f4)
  • mobile: implement responsive design across dashboard (149651e), closes hi#traffic
  • Phase 1 foundation - Project setup and structure (d252ede)
  • product page added (f36d46c)
  • quick-links: implement customizable quick links widget (cd992c3)
  • security: add user data isolation across all database operations (8adb7a1)
  • Set up SQLite database with schema and CRUD operations (0216e60)
  • tasks: add category system with management ui (8dbcb92)
  • tasks: add user filtering and refactor daily components (f808ba1)
  • ui: add breadcrumb nav and command palette (d9ed5c5)
  • ui: add success feedback and task completion animations (e388744)
  • ui: add tag autocomplete and related content suggestions (6ab6eda)
  • ux: add progress animations and achievement confetti (6a27afd)
  • ux: add templates, NLP input, and page transitions (c530116)
  • year-in-review: add yearly statistics and summary page (8cea9cd)
  • yearly: add shareable year in review card (dccdac3)

Performance Improvements

  • calendar: optimize rendering with lazy loading (8a9b18c)
